InvitationSubTitle: sharing my special ceremony with you
InvitationDescription: I'm writing to let you know about my graduation ceremony.
Quote: Every moment with you is memorable.
WishesSent: Your beautiful wishes have been sent to me.
ExcitedToSeeYou: I'm excited to see you at the ceremony!
WillMissYou: I'll miss you, but thank you for letting me know.
DevelopmentWarning: This website is currently under development and is updated daily. Some features may change.

HeaderNav.NavigationDescription: Browse the main sections of Campu.
HeaderNav.Tagline: Warm notes, soft maps, and little keepsakes

Footer.Blessing: May the world be gentle with you.
Footer.Description: A small corner for saving kind memories, thoughtful routes, and the stories that make each trip feel personal.
Footer.Promise: Built to feel like a postcard from the road

Home.Eyebrow: A gentle map of places, feelings, and roads worth remembering
Home.Title: Wandering through Vietnam, one warm memory at a time
Home.Description: This is a travel diary shaped like a soft invitation: part photo album, part route notebook, part reminder that the best trips are the ones that stay kind in your memory.
Home.HeroNote: Start with the journey map if you want the full route, or leave a kind note if you came here for the personal side of the story.
Home.HeroImageAlt: A portrait-style travel memory from Vietnam

FeatureCard.Title: Places that felt bigger than the map
FeatureCard.Description: From quick weekend escapes to longer detours, each stop adds a little more texture to the story.

JourneyStory.Title: The road became a way to notice life more carefully
JourneyStory.Paragraph1: What began as a simple weekend getaway slowly turned into a habit of paying attention. From misty mountain mornings in Ha Giang to quiet afternoons near the sea in Phu Quoc, each place left behind a different kind of memory.
JourneyStory.Paragraph2: I care less about collecting destinations and more about remembering how each trip felt: the food after a long ride, the people who helped, the small details that never make it onto a checklist.
JourneyStory.Paragraph3: This space gathers those fragments together so the journey feels shareable, useful, and still a little personal.
JourneyStory.ImageAlt: Travel memories layered like a scrapbook postcard

MyPurpose.Title: Travel, for me, is equal parts curiosity and care
MyPurpose.Description: I want this project to feel helpful without losing its heart: a place where routes, photos, and reflections live together in the same gentle rhythm.
MyPurpose.ExploreDesc: Find corners of Vietnam that feel quiet, surprising, or beautifully overlooked.
MyPurpose.CaptureDesc: Hold onto the light, colors, and scenes that would otherwise disappear too quickly.
MyPurpose.ConnectDesc: Remember the people, conversations, and kindness that gave each place its real shape.

ReadyToStart.Title: Start with the map, then follow whatever catches your heart
ReadyToStart.Description: The journey page is the clearest way to browse the places I have visited, the shape of each trip, and the little details worth keeping for your own planning.
ReadyToStart.SupportingNote: Warm, personal, and still practical enough to use.

CV.HRAssistantDescription: Chat for recruiter outreach, screening coordination, or hiring follow-up

InterviewChatWidget.Intro: Share your recruiter details, ask about the candidate, or line up a screening call or interview.
InterviewChatWidget.Name: Recruiter name
InterviewChatWidget.AskPlaceholder: Ask about the candidate, hiring fit, or outreach timing…
InterviewChatWidget.AskMorePrefill: Tell me more about this candidate and fit for the role.
InterviewChatWidget.SaveProfilePrefill: Help me draft a first outreach message to this candidate.
InterviewChatWidget.SaveProfilePrompt: I am a recruiter and just saved my recruiter/company outreach context: name {name}, company {company}, phone {phone}, company address {companyAddress}, work email {email}, role or hiring context {aboutMe}. Please use these details as recruiter/company context, not as the candidate's identity.
InterviewChatWidget.ScheduleSummaryInterview: I want to send interview outreach on {date} at {time}.
InterviewChatWidget.ScheduleSummaryQuickCall: I want to set up a screening call on {date} at {time}.
InterviewChatWidget.ScheduleSubtitle: A simple placeholder scheduler for recruiter follow-up that you can later connect to calendar and email APIs.
InterviewChatWidget.NoDate: Choose a date and time first
InterviewChatWidget.ErrorSending: The assistant could not respond right now. Please check your AI setup and try again.
